title: Error "BATproject: does not match always" with subselect/groupby/having
key_bug_features: Error with subselect and group by having clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "sys"."test" ("zs" INTEGER, "zd" INTEGER, "ns" BIGINT, "bs" BIGINT, "name" VARCHAR(50));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT "name", SUM("ns") AS total_ns FROM "sys"."test" GROUP BY "name" HAVING total_ns > 15000000000) AS subquery;
SELECT "zs", "zd" FROM "sys"."test" WHERE "bs" IS NULL OR "bs" < 100;
